@startuml
skinparam ClassDiagram labelStyle "C"
skinparam Interface labelStyle "I"

class Player {
    +int xPos
    +int yPos
    +boolean alive
    +int identifier
    +Player()
    +boolean getStatus()
    +int getXPos()
    +int getYPos()
    +void setStatus()
    +void setxPos()
    +void setyPos()
    +int getIdentifier()
    +void run()
}

class Bomb {
    +int xPos
    +int yPos
    +static final int[][] DIREC
    +Bomb()
    +int getXPos()
    +int getYPos()
    +void explode()
    +void run()
}

class Creature {
    +Creature()
    +moveTo()
}

class Floor {
    +Floor()
}

class Wall {
    +Wall()
}

class Runnables {
    +void run()
}

class Thing {
    +World world
    +Tile<Thing> tile
    +Color color
    +char glyph
    +Thing()
    +getX()
    +getY()
    +setTile()
    +getColor()
    +setGlyph()
}

class Tile {
    +T thing
    +int xPos
    +int yPos
    +Tile()
    +Tile(int xPos, int yPos)
    +T getThing()
    +void setThing()
    +int getXPos()
    +void setxPos()
    +int getYPos()
    +void setyPos()
}

class World {
    +static final int WIDTH = 20
    +static final int HEIGHT = 20
    +List<Thing> entities
    +int[][] maze
    +boolean running
    +Tile<Thing>[][] tiles
    +World()
    +Thing get()
    +void put()
    +void remove()
    +List<Thing> getEntities()
    +void removeEntities()
    +int getMaze()
    +void setMaze()
    +void clearScreen()
    +void gameOver()
    +void gameWin()
}

class Serializable {
}

class Player extends Creature {
    +Player()
    +boolean getStatus()
    +int getXPos()
    +int getYPos()
    +void setStatus()
    +void setxPos()
    +void setyPos()
    +int getIdentifier()
    +void run()
}

    +void explode()
    +void run()
}

    +void run()
}
